{
  "analysis": "The shell is responsive. The refined OCR script was interrupted, so /app/solution.txt likely still contains the previous noisy 501-line output with partial typed prefixes and game-output artifacts. The fastest low-risk next step is to inspect the current file, then clean it with prefix collapsing and filtering heuristics from the existing noisy OCR lines. If that is insufficient, we can rerun a faster targeted OCR later.",
  "plan": "First inspect /app/solution.txt to confirm its current state. Then run a cleanup script that collapses consecutive prefix fragments into longest variants and filters out game-output/noise lines, writing cleaned moves back to /app/solution.txt. Finally inspect the cleaned file line count and head/tail to verify the result.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- current solution ---'; wc -l /app/solution.txt; head -30 /app/solution.txt; echo TAIL; tail -20 /app/solution.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/clean_solution.py <<'PY'
import re

INP='/app/solution.txt'
OUT='/app/solution.txt'
with open(INP) as f:
    raw=[line.rstrip('\n') for line in f]

def is_game_output(s):
    low=s.lower()
    phrases=[
        'done.', 'taken.', 'you are', 'you hear', 'you see', 'there is', 'there are',
        'on the ground', 'suspicious-looking', 'stiletto', 'scream', 'butt',
        'this is', 'it is', 'can be seen', 'strange passage', 'cyclops room',
        'slide room', 'mine entrance', 'squeaky room', 'white cliffs beach',
        'damp cave', 'loud room', 'treasure room', 'jewel-encrusted', 'platinum bar',
        'silver chalice', 'the thief', 'deflates.', 'your own feet', 'heavy iron chain',
        'end of the chain', 'three sides', 'more', 'at the end of',
        'room score', 'moves:', 'revision', 'serial number', 'copyright',
        'zork i:', 'infocom', 'all rights reserved', 'west of house',
        'staircase to the', 'reservoir', 'southeast.', 'cin>', 'cind', 'cin',
        'wind can', 'wind canar', 'wind canary', '1s a suspicious', 'suspicious—'
    ]
    return any(ph in low for ph in phrases)

def looks_like_move(s):
    if not s or is_game_output(s): return False
    low=s.lower()
    if re.fullmatch(r'(n|s|e|w|u|d|ne|nw|se|sw)', low): return True
    if re.fullmatch(r'[a-z0-9 ,.\-]{1,50}', low) and not re.search(r'\d{4,}', low):
        parts=low.split()
        first=parts[0] if parts else ''
        verbs={'get','take','drop','put','open','close','light','kill','slay','move','push','pull',
               'set','raise','lower','wave','dig','shove','give','wind','pray','save','look',
               'inventory','read','rub','climb','pour','fill','blow','throw','attack','drink',
               'eat','count','wait','board','disembark','launch','land','unwrap','tie','untie',
               'turn','press','type','enter','go','examine','lock','unlock','inflate','deflate',
               'pump','squeeze','touch','kick','jump','swim','cross','leave','follow','shoot',
               'solve','ring'}
        if first in verbs: return True
    return False

def clean_cmd(s):
    s=s.replace('»','>').replace('_','').replace('|','')
    s=re.sub(r'^[>\s]+','',s)
    s=s.strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    s=re.sub(r'[\\|_]+$','',s).strip()
    s=s.rstrip('.')
    return s

collapsed=[]
for line in raw:
    c=clean_cmd(line)
    if not c: continue
    if collapsed and (c.startswith(collapsed[-1]) or collapsed[-1].startswith(c)):
        if len(c) >= len(collapsed[-1]):
            collapsed[-1]=c
    else:
        collapsed.append(c)

final=[]
for c in collapsed:
    if not looks_like_move(c): continue
    if final and c == final[-1]: continue
    final.append(c)

with open(OUT,'w') as f:
    for m in final:
        f.write(m+'\n')

print('raw lines', len(raw))
print('collapsed', len(collapsed))
print('final moves', len(final))
for i,m in enumerate(final,1):
    print(i,m)
PY
python3 /tmp/clean_solution.py
",
      "duration": 5.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- cleaned solution ---'; wc -l /app/solution.txt; head -60 /app/solution.txt; echo '--- tail ---'; tail -25 /app/solution.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
